title: Ganjam District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Motor Lunch Driver and Khalasi Posts
shortInfo: Ganjam District has released the official Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi Notification 2026 at Ganjam District Official Website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the Ganjam District Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi Recruitment 2026. Eligible 12th-pass candidates with relevant launch driving license/Navik Training Certificate can apply offline on or before 28 May 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form details are available below.

basic_details.job_title: Ganjam District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Motor Lunch Driver and Khalasi Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ganjam District has released the official Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi Notification 2026 at Ganjam District Official Website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the Ganjam District Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi Recruitment 2026. Eligible 12th-pass candidates with relevant launch driving license/Navik Training Certificate can apply offline on or before 28 May 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form details are available below.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules. Specific age limits are not provided in the notification.

qualification.details: Motor Launch Driver: Minimum 2nd Class Launch Driving License from Directorate of Ports and Inland Water Transport, Odisha. Ability to swim 200 meters in 20 minutes in river, canal or any flowing water body. Preference will be given to candidates with experience from SPEO (State Port Engineering Organization). Boat Khalasi: Navik Training Certificate from Navik Training Institute. Ability to swim 200 meters in 20 minutes in river, canal or any flowing water body.

salary_details.pay_scale: Motor Launch Driver: Rs. 13,900/-, Khalasi: Rs. 12,600/-
salary_details.details: Motor Launch Driver: Rs. 13,900/- per month Boat Khalasi: Rs. 12,600/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ganjam District Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ganjam.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ganjam District recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Ganjam District Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi posts is 28th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced by Ganjam District. Out of these, 5 vacancies are for Motor Launch Driver and 5 vacancies are for Boat Khalasi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Motor Launch Driver, a Minimum 2nd Class Launch Driving License is required. For Boat Khalasi, a Navik Training Certificate is necessary. A general minimum qualification of 12th pass is also indicated.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi positions?
faq.answer: The Motor Launch Driver will receive a salary of Rs. 13,900/- per month, and the Boat Khalasi will receive Rs. 12,600/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Ganjam District recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these temporary posts will primarily involve a Skill Test. Candidates will be evaluated based on their performance in this test.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for these posts. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for Ganjam District jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the Ganjam District Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via registered post or in person.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: Completed application forms should be sent by registered post or submitted in person at the District Emergency Department, District Collectorate, Ganjam, Chhatrapur.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 28th May 2026. Application verification and skill tests are scheduled for 22nd August 2023.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Motor Launch Driver and Khalasi posts. Candidates should refer to the official notification for any age-related details.
